features.name: Spider Climb
features.description: The lizard can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Scout - Mobile climber with wall-walking ability
tactical_info.positioning: Uses Spider Climb to attack from unexpected angles
tactical_info.key_abilities: Spider Climb allows ceiling and wall traversal
tactical_info.weaknesses: Low HP and AC make it fragile in direct combat
tactical_info.synergies: Excellent for ambush tactics and difficult terrain navigation
